accountInformation.title: Account Information
accountInformation.intro: When you create an account using Google OAuth, we collect:

recipeData.title: Recipe Data
recipeData.intro: When you use our recipe management features, we store:
data: Recipe content you create or import
Recipe categories and tags you assign
Your recipe search and filtering preferences

usageInformation.title: Usage Information
data: AI interaction logs (prompts and responses for cost tracking)
Feature usage analytics through Vercel Analytics
Performance metrics through Vercel Speed Insights
Error logs for debugging and service improvement

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
uses: Provide and maintain the Meal Maestro service
Authenticate your account and maintain login sessions
Store and manage your personal recipe collection
Process AI-powered recipe operations using OpenAI
Track API usage costs and provide cost transparency
Improve our service through analytics and performance monitoring
Send essential service communications (if email features are enabled)
Comply with legal obligations and prevent abuse

googleOAuth.title: Google OAuth
googleOAuth.content: We use Google OAuth for authentication. Google's privacy policy applies to data collected during the authentication process. We only request access to basic profile information (email, name, profile picture).

supabase.title: Supabase (Database & Auth)
supabase.content: Your recipe data and account information are stored securely in Supabase's cloud database infrastructure. Supabase operates under their privacy policy and maintains SOC 2 compliance.

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.intro: When you use AI features, your recipe-related prompts are sent to OpenAI for processing. We:
practices: Only send recipe-related content, never personal information
Do not store conversations on OpenAI's servers
Track usage for cost monitoring and transparency
OpenAI's data usage policy applies to these interactions

vercel.title: Vercel (Hosting & Analytics)
vercel.intro: Our application is hosted on Vercel, which provides:

services.name: Resend
services.purpose: Email service (when email features are active)

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your information:
measures: All data is transmitted using HTTPS encryption
Database access is secured with Row Level Security (RLS) policies
Authentication is handled through secure OAuth flows
API keys and secrets are stored securely and rotated regularly
Access to user data is limited to essential service operations
dataSecurity.disclaimer: However, no internet transmission or electronic storage method is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of your information.

dataRetention.title: Data Retention

policies.retention: Retained while your account is active
Retained until you delete individual recipes or your account
Retained for up to 90 days for cost tracking and analytics
Retained for up to 30 days for debugging purposes

dataRetention.accountDeletion: When you delete your account, we remove your personal data and recipes. Usage and cost tracking data may be retained in anonymized form for operational purposes.

yourRights.title: Your Rights

rights.name: Access
rights.description: View all personal data we hold about you

rights.name: Deletion
rights.description: Request deletion of your account and personal data

rights.name: Portability
rights.description: Export your recipe data in a standard format

rights.name: Restriction
rights.description: Limit how we process your information

rights.name: Objection
rights.description: Object to certain types of processing

yourRights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us using the information provided below. We will respond within 30 days.

cookies.title: Cookies and Local Storage
cookies.intro: We use cookies and local storage for:

uses.name: Preferences
uses.purpose: Storing your theme and language preferences

uses.name: Functionality
uses.purpose: Remembering your recipe filters and search preferences

cookies.control: You can control cookies through your browser settings, but some features may not work properly if cookies are disabled.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.intro: We may update this privacy policy occasionally to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. When we make significant changes, we will:
process: Update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page
Notify users through the application interface
For major changes, provide advance notice via email (if email features are active)
changes.acceptance: Continued use of Meal Maestro after policy changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have questions about this privacy policy or want to exercise your rights, contact us:

footer.effective: This privacy policy is effective as of {date} and applies to all users of Meal Maestro.
